## Type of Change
- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation update
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactoring (no behavior change)
- [ ] `test` — Tests added/updated
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance

## Checklist
- [ ] I pulled latest `develop` before branching
- [ ] I followed the commit message convention
- [ ] I tested my changes locally
- [ ] I did NOT push directly to `main`
- [ ] My branch targets `develop`, not `main`
